name: wherehouse-inventory-root
description: Root configuration for Warehouse Inventory System

scripts.db:start: C:\pgsql\bin\pg_ctl.exe -D "C:\pgsql\data" status >NUL 2>&1 && echo Postgres already running || C:\pgsql\bin\pg_ctl.exe -D "C:\pgsql\data" -l "D:\Coding\Wherehouse Inventory\pg.log" start
scripts.bootstrap:mobile: npm run db:start && npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:create-admin --prefix backend
scripts.bootstrap:mobile:reset: npm run db:start && npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend && npm run db:create-admin --prefix backend
scripts.dev: npm run db:start && concurrently --raw --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run studio"
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run db:start && concurrently --raw --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix mobile"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mobile
